C1_PASS2_TARGETED_REPRESENTATIVE_FRAME_R.strongest_counter_evidence: All 84 representative frames failed exact cropped RGB SHA256 parity. Root cause: the production decode path (pyav_iter_frames, which accesses stream.codec_context) produces different pixel values than any alternative decode path (direct av.open + seek + decode) for the same video frame. This was verified by comparing the production decoder.iter_frames() output against direct av.open + demux + decode for the same frame index: pixels differ (max_diff=255, ~143K/6.2M differing pixels). The production HW decode path is non-reproducible by alternative container opens. C1 cannot achieve exact parity.
C1_PASS2_TARGETED_REPRESENTATIVE_FRAME_R.rejection_reason: EXACT_PARITY_FAIL — all 84 representative frames differ. The production decode path (pyav_iter_frames with stream.codec_context access) produces pixel values that no seek-based alternative decode path can reproduce. This is a HW decode environment-specific behavior, not a fixable bug.

C2_PASS1_SAMPLE_FRAME_RETENTION.strongest_counter_evidence: Exact current representative-frame selection cannot be performed with bounded O(number_of_segments) frame storage. Retention is O(frames_sampled) = ~7.47 GB (1201 frames at 1920x1080x3). No project memory budget defined.
C2_PASS1_SAMPLE_FRAME_RETENTION.rejection_reason: UNBOUNDED_RETENTION_NO_RESOURCE_BUDGET — full sampled-frame retention required (~7.47 GB). No bounded O(segments) model exists. No project memory budget defined.

C3_PYAV_DECODE_CONFIGURATION_TUNING.strongest_counter_evidence: Only thread_count and thread_type are writable and potentially parity-preserving. Both are software threading options ignored by NVDEC hardware decode. No concrete mechanism to reduce HW decode cost. No evidence-supported variant.
C3_PYAV_DECODE_CONFIGURATION_TUNING.rejection_reason: NO_EVIDENCE_SUPPORTED_CONFIGURATION_VARIANT — the only parity-preserving writable properties (thread_count, thread_type) have no mechanism to reduce NVDEC HW decode cost.

C4_INSUFFICIENT_TARGET_OPTIMIZATION_DISC.description: Honest fallback: C1 fails exact parity, C2 has no bounded resource model, C3 has no evidence-supported variant. DECODE_FRAME_PIPELINE remains the accepted primary bottleneck but no targeted optimization can be safely selected.
